title: Flaky Mexican Roast German Sausages
description: A crowd-pleasing mexican dish featuring low-fat-friendly roast german sausages that are seasoned with herbs for a deliciously flaky texture and a tangy kick.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: For searing and brushing the sausages

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a small pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant.
Place German sausages on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, drizzle them with extra virgin olive oil, sprinkle with salt, pepper, oregano, red pepper flakes, and minced garlic.
Roast the sausages in the oven for 15 minutes or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Remove from heat and let them cool slightly. Serve warm with a side of tangy yogurt sauce if desired.
To make the tangy yogurt sauce, mix together low-fat plain yogurt, chopped parsley, lemon juice, and salt to taste.
